summary: iter223 multi-item benchmark testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend Benchmark tab shows mixed samples with complexity pills (MIXED-2/3/4+), item counts, and Fingerprint buttons. Mobile /m/waste regression passed with single ECW header and capture buttons.
test_credentials: No auth needed - devAuth=1 bypass used
seed_data_creation: 11 pre-seeded mixed samples (bs-mix-t2-*, bs-mix-t3-*, bs-mix-t4-*) + 23 legacy single-item samples exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter223 multi-item benchmark features fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /samples with expected_items, POST /compose-mixed, PATCH /samples/{id} with trust_fingerprint, POST /run with multi-item scoring, POST /runs/{id}/trust-all-matched, GET /runs/{id} with multi-item per_sample shape. Frontend: Benchmark tab shows complexity pills, item counts, Fingerprint buttons. Mobile /m/waste has single ECW header with capture buttons. Best accuracy 88% (B grade) achieved.
